Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class AssetAction

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.AssetAction
public class AssetAction extends SObject

Java class for AssetAction complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AssetAction">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ActionDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActualTaxChange" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AdjustmentAmountChange" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Amount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Asset" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Asset" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AssetActionNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AssetActionSources" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AssetId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Category" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CategoryEnum" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EstimatedTaxChange" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MrrChange" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProductAmountChange" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="QuantityChange" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SubtotalChange" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalCancellationsAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalCrossSellsAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalDownsellsAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalInitialSaleAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalMrr" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalOtherAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalQuantity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalRenewalsAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalTermsAndConditionsAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalTransfersAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalUpsellsAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
